channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 1 com severidade Crítica
• 4 com severidade Alta
• 2 novas CVEs
• 0 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

📰 From Platform to Data: Building a Cloud-Native Developer Experience On-Prem with VMware Cloud Foundation
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Today’s developer expects friction-free access to infrastructure. In the public cloud, if a developer needs a Kubernetes cluster, a virtual machine, or a database, they simply press a button or an API call and the resources are ready in minutes. But what happens when data sovereignty, compliance, or cost predictability dictates that these workloads run …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/10/tired-of-it-tickets-slowing-down-your-developers-on-prem-provisioning-doesnt-have-to-be-a-bottleneck-see-how-platform-engineering-on-vmware-cloud-foundation-vcf-transforms-it-gatekeepers-into-ena/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

📰 Nearly 4,000 US industrial devices exposed to Iranian cyberattacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The attack surface targeted by Iranian-linked hackers in cyberattacks against U.S. critical infrastructure networks includes thousands of Internet-exposed programmable logic controllers (PLCs) manufactured by Rockwell Automation.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/nearly-4-000-us-industrial-devices-exposed-to-iranian-cyberattacks/
 
📰 EngageLab SDK Flaw Exposed 50M Android Users, Including 30M Crypto Wallet Installs
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Details have emerged about a now-patched security vulnerability in a widely used third-party Android software development kit (SDK) called EngageLab SDK that could have put millions of cryptocurrency wallet users at risk. "This flaw allows apps on the same device to bypass Android security sandbox and gain unauthorized access to private data," the Microsoft Defender
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/engagelab-sdk-flaw-exposed-50m-android.html
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-34424 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
Smart Slider 3 Pro version 3.5.1.35 for WordPress and Joomla contains a multi-stage remote access toolkit injected through a compromised update system that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code and commands. Attackers can trigger pre-authentication remote shell execution via HTTP headers, establish authenticated backdoors accepting arbitrary PHP code or OS commands, create hidden administrator ac...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34424
 
🚨 CVE-2023-54358 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.1
Resumo:
WordPress adivaha Travel Plugin 2.3 contains a reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts by manipulating the isMobile parameter. Attackers can craft malicious URLs containing JavaScript payloads in the isMobile GET parameter at the /mobile-app/v3/ endpoint to execute arbitrary code in victims' browsers and steal session tokens or credentials.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-54358
 
📰 Plugin WordPress Smart Slider 3 Pro teve atualização sequestrada - CISO Advisor
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a WordPress no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxNWHBDQzJlUnpKY2p1ZVpBNUtZRU1Uc2VPLWtIeFhaUmY1a1czMW1UMGZoc0tobFMzSHFUbE1RNG84SnVBeDYtd19Hc0dPOHhSQmxkaTAwRFhwc043SVlWODJoRzJWbERBMHRGcjFnbWdNY25BbXZkYVZQMEdWNlFPZE5kYi1lOXJrcERIN1diWFhobTZFXzZNRlVQUXM?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 09/04/2026 e 10/04/2026.
